en: IdleFramework
zh: 放置引擎

en: IdleFramework Fatal Error
zh: 放置引擎 致命错误

en: IdleFramework launch failed.
zh: 放置引擎启动失败。

en: GameResource not specified.
zh: 未指定游戏资源。

en: GameID of GameResource is invalid for file-system.
zh: 游戏资源的GameID无法用于文件系统的文件名。

en: PackedUIScene not specified.
zh: 未指定UI场景封包。

en: UIScene instantiation error.
zh: UI场景实例化出错。

en: MotherNode: _Ready() starting.
zh: MotherNode: 正在执行_Ready()。

en: MotherNode: InitCheck() starting.
zh: MotherNode: 正在执行InitCheck()。

en: MotherNode: Runtime builtin translations were added.
zh: MotherNode: 内置运行时翻译已加载到翻译域。

en: MotherNode: Launch completed.
zh: MotherNode: 启动完毕。

en: MotherNode: Added UIScene to child.
zh: MotherNode: 已添加UI场景为子场景。

en: MotherNode: Unexpected to found old UIScene on placing new instance, the old one was enqueued to free.
zh: MotherNode: 超出预期地在放置新UI场景时发现旧实例，旧实例已被添加到节点释放队列。

en: MotherNode: Unhandled exception on SaveAccess async working: {0}
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess在异步工作时抛出未处理的异常: {0}

en: MotherNode: Task unsuccessfully without exception on SaveAccess async working.
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess在异步工作时Task不带异常地未成功完成。

en: MotherNode: Got unknown result from SaveAccess async working.
zh: MotherNode: 从SaveAccess异步工作接收到未知的返回结果。

en: MotherNode: SaveAccess returned WorkResult.OtherError.
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess返回的工作结果为WorkResult.OtherError。

en: MotherNode: SaveAccess parsing save failed.
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess解析存档失败。

en: MotherNode: SaveAccess errors on File IO.
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess在文件读写上发生错误。

en: MotherNode: SaveAccess failed to find latest save.
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess获取最后存档失败。

en: SaveAccess: Failed to get latest save for GameID {0}.
zh: SaveAccess: 未能获取游戏ID {0} 的最后存档。

en: SaveAccess: Failed to read save file.
zh: SaveAccess: 读取存档文件失败。

en: SaveAccess: SaveData parser returned null.
zh: SaveAccess: 存档数据解析器返回了null。

en: SaveData: Item id "{0}" givened in SpaceContainer PrefillItems of SpaceRegistryObject with id "{1}" is not found in ItemRegistry.
zh: SaveData: 对于ID为"{1}"的空间注册表项的空间容器预装物品给定的物品ID"{0}"，不能在物品注册表中找到对应项。

en: NumberProviderSum: An unexpected GetNumber() call has blocked by recursion lock, please check the GameResource to make sure NumberProviders aren't looping references.
zh: NumberProviderSum: 一个非预期的GetNumber()调用已被递归锁阻拦，请检查游戏资源以确保数值提供器没有发生循环引用。

en: NumberProviderSum: Catched exception on calling NumberProviders in SumList: {0}
zh: NumberProviderSum: 调用SumList中的数值提供器时捕获到异常: {0}

en: RichDataItemData: An unexpected Duplicate() call has blocked by recursion lock.
zh: RichDataItemData: 一个非预期的Duplicate()调用已被递归锁阻拦。

en: RichDataItemData: Catched exception on calling List<RichDataItemData>.Duplicate(): {0}
zh: RichDataItemData: 调用List<RichDataItemData>.Duplicate()时捕获到异常: {0}

en: RichDataItemData: Cannot convert an unsupported type data into a JToken.
zh: RichDataItemData: 无法将不支持的类型的数据转换到JToken。

en: RichDataItemData: Cannot convert an unsupported JToken type into a RichDataItemData.
zh: RichDataItemData: 无法将不支持的JToken类型转换到RichDataItemData。

en: RichDataItemData: Unsupported JToken type of child token of JArray: {0}
zh: RichDataItemData: JArray的子令牌为不支持的JToken类型: {0}

en: RichDataHelper: SaveData RDI Dictionary givened is null.
zh: RichDataHelper: 给定的SaveData富数据物品字典为null。
